_meta.description: Dynamic extension of THEME_POOL in generate-prompts.mjs. Never mutate the hardcoded pool — add here only.

themes.name: Storybook Character Design
themes.rationale: Leverages the 'Library/Reading Joy' trend for National Library Week, focusing on creative character development for digital activities.

themes.name: Nature's Hidden Patterns
themes.rationale: Inspired by Waldorf principles and spring/nature trends, focusing on discovering and tracing natural patterns in a digital format.

themes.name: Daily Routine & Calendar Play
themes.rationale: Addresses the 'Calendar Skills' trend, providing printable activities to build routine and date recognition skills.

themes.name: Educational Puzzles (Coloring, Word Search, Maze)
themes.rationale: Viral theme from competitor intelligence

themes.name: Goal-Setting and Personal Growth
themes.rationale: Viral theme from competitor intelligence

themes.name: halloween printable maze puzzle activity page
themes.rationale: Viral theme from competitor intelligence

themes.name: Seasonal & Holiday Specific
themes.rationale: Viral theme from competitor intelligence

themes.name: Nostalgia and Playfulness
themes.rationale: Viral theme from competitor intelligence

themes.name: Skill-Building & Developmental Focus
themes.rationale: Viral theme from competitor intelligence

themes.name: Seasonal & Holiday Printables
themes.rationale: Viral theme from competitor intelligence

themes.name: Library Storyland
themes.rationale: This theme aligns with 'National Library Week' and offers a novel angle on reading and imaginative play.

themes.name: Baking Adventures
themes.rationale: A specific focus on kitchen activities and recipes provides a fresh take on 'Food and Cooking' which was too broad.

themes.name: Kindness Garden
themes.rationale: This theme visually ties acts of kindness to nature, making it distinct from general community or kindness challenges.

themes.name: Springtime Rhymes
themes.rationale: Focuses on creative writing and poetry, identified as a content gap beyond general fine motor skill development.

themes.name: Easter Word Searches
themes.rationale: Viral theme from competitor intelligence

themes.name: Spring-themed activities
themes.rationale: Viral theme from competitor intelligence

themes.name: Earth Day Let's Recycle Matching Activity
themes.rationale: Viral theme from competitor intelligence

themes.name: Nostalgic 'throwback kid' content
themes.rationale: Viral theme from competitor intelligence

themes.name: Skill-building or structured learning
themes.rationale: Viral theme from competitor intelligence

themes.name: DIY & Craft Projects
themes.rationale: Viral theme from competitor intelligence

themes.name: Renewable Energy Adventures
themes.rationale: This builds on the Earth Day theme with a specific environmental focus, identified as a content gap.

themes.name: Weather Watchers
themes.rationale: This theme addresses the suggested 'Weather Phenomena' gap, offering seasonal relevance for spring.

themes.name: Cosmic Explorers (Early Learners)
themes.rationale: This leverages the 'Space Exploration (Basic)' idea, providing a novel educational angle for the target age.

themes.name: Mother's Day Memory Makers
themes.rationale: Directly addresses the rising search for 'Mothers Day printables' and 'activities for kids' with a clear, actionable theme.

themes.name: Backyard Bug Detectives
themes.rationale: Connects to the trending 'Bugs/Insects' theme, offering a hands-on, nature-based learning experience.

themes.name: Community Helpers & Professions
themes.rationale: This theme offers rich opportunities for role-playing and learning about the world, identified as a gap in competitor content.

themes.name: Transportation & Travel Adventures
themes.rationale: A perennially popular topic for this age group, providing diverse visual and activity options not currently in dynamic pools.

themes.name: Dinosaurs & Prehistoric World
themes.rationale: Dinosaurs consistently captivate children's imaginations and are a strong, untapped theme for printable activities.

themes.name: Outer Space & Astronomy Explorers
themes.rationale: Offers a sense of wonder and learning about planets, stars, and rockets, distinct from existing nature or seasonal themes.

themes.name: Farm Life & Animal Friends
themes.rationale: While 'Baking Adventures' exists, a broader 'Farm Life' theme allows for animal identification, chores, and storytelling printables.
